# Aamantran

> Aamantran is a digital wedding invitation platform in India. Couples pick a hand-crafted template, pay once (starting at ₹999, no subscription), and get a personalised invitation website they share as a link on WhatsApp. Every invitation includes live RSVP tracking per ceremony (Haldi, Sangeet, Wedding, Reception), photo galleries, background music, Google Maps venue pins, and a live countdown — guests need no app.

Aamantran means "invitation" in Sanskrit. The service is fully digital: no printed cards are produced or shipped. Invitations go live in under 30 minutes and can be edited anytime from the couple's dashboard without the link changing. Operated by PLEXZUU; support via WhatsApp +91 91747 73644 or aamantran@plexzuu.com (Mon–Sat, 9 AM–9 PM IST).

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.aamantran.online/): What Aamantran offers, feature overview, and cost comparison vs printed cards (₹10,000–40,000) and video invites (₹4,000–5,000).
- [Templates](https://www.aamantran.online/templates): Browse all digital wedding invitation designs — Hindu, Muslim, Sikh, Christian and universal styles, with live demos, prices and reviews.
- [FAQ](https://www.aamantran.online/faq): ~20 answered questions on ordering, WhatsApp sharing, RSVPs, editing, pricing and data privacy.
- [About](https://www.aamantran.online/about): The story behind Aamantran — 500+ couples served, 20+ templates, 5-star rated.
- [Contact](https://www.aamantran.online/contact): WhatsApp, email and contact form; urgent same-day setups supported.

## Policies

- [Refund Policy](https://www.aamantran.online/refund)
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.aamantran.online/privacy)
